summary: The diff implements all four requirements. REQ-1 (Edit Contact Info quick-link on admin dashboard) is present in AdminDashboardPage.tsx. REQ-2 (public gallery, category filters, admin-only controls) is implemented in ProjectGalleryPage.tsx. REQ-3 (project detail modal) is implemented via the new ProjectDetailModal.tsx and integrated into ProjectGalleryPage.tsx. REQ-4 (admin ShieldCheck icon in header) is implemented in Layout.tsx. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed with no obvious gaps or hallucinated features.
